name: Sansei Landic Co.,Ltd
summary: Sansei Landic Company Limited engages in the real estate and construction businesses in Japan. The company plans, purchases, sells, and manages the limited property rights of the land. It also procures and sells real estate properties that involve rights adjustments relating to leasehold land, properties with existing residence, and other pieces of real estate. In addition, the company plans, designs, constructs, renovates, rehabilitates, reforms, and manages custom designed homes. It offers its products and services in Osaka, Sapporo, Sendai, Tokyo, Musashino, Yokohama, Nagoya, Kyoto, Kansai, and Fukuoka locations. The company was formerly known as Sansei Service Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Sansei Landic Company Limited in February 1997. Sansei Landic Company Limited was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
